networkSwitcherModal.title: Select network
networkSwitcherModal.searchPlaceholder: Search network by name or chain ID
networkSwitcherModal.connectWalletMessage: Connect your wallet to switch networks.
networkSwitcherModal.switchFailedFallback: Could not switch network. Please try again.

tokenSelectorModal.title: Select a token
tokenSelectorModal.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, symbol, or contract address
tokenSelectorModal.connectWalletMessage: Connect your wallet to search tokens, see your balances, and select one.
tokenSelectorModal.noActiveChainMessage: No active chain detected. Open your wallet and select a supported network.

submitTransaction.connectWalletToApproveAllowance: Connect your wallet to approve allowance.
submitTransaction.approvalFailedOrReverted: Approval transaction failed or was reverted.
submitTransaction.allowanceVerificationFailed: Could not verify token allowance. Please try again.

minimumReceived.label: Minimum received
minimumReceived.tooltip: The minimum amount you will receive if the price moves unfavorably before your transaction is confirmed. Based on your slippage tolerance.

swapPriceImpact.label: Swap price impact
swapPriceImpact.tooltip: The estimated market impact from the swap itself, excluding route fees.

feePriceImpact.label: Fee price impact
feePriceImpact.tooltip: Extra impact caused by fees in this route.

priceImpact.label: Price impact
priceImpact.tooltip: The effect your trade has on the market price. Larger trades typically have higher impact, which may result in worse execution.

swapDetails.unavailableDataWarning: Be careful, some data is unavailable for this swap.

recipientAddressInput.label: Recipient address (optional)
recipientAddressInput.tooltip: Optional wallet address that will receive the output tokens. If you do not provide it, your connected address will be used.

slippageInput.label: Slippage tolerance
slippageInput.tooltip: Slippage is the maximum price change you accept between the quote and execution. If the market moves more than this percentage, the transaction is cancelled.

platformFeeInput.label: Donation (optional)
platformFeeInput.tooltip: This is a free tool. Optional donations help cover hosting costs. No fees are charged for swaps.

riskAcknowledgmentModal.title: Important Crypto Risk Warning
riskAcknowledgmentModal.intro: Before using this app with a connected wallet, you must acknowledge the following risks:
risks: This is a technical tool only and does not provide financial advice.
Cryptocurrency activity can result in total loss of funds.
You retain full custody and responsibility for your wallet and private keys.
Blockchain transactions are irreversible once submitted.
You are solely responsible for compliance, taxes, and all usage outcomes.

transactionErrors.insufficientFundsForGas: Insufficient funds to pay gas fees.

errors.insufficientBalance: Insufficient {{symbol}} balance for this swap amount.
errors.tokenMismatch: Select different tokens to request a quote.
errors.noLiquidity: No liquidity is available for this swap right now.
errors.quoteFetchFailed: We could not fetch a swap quote right now. Please try again.
errors.balanceFetchFailed: Could not verify your token balance. Please try again.
errors.txFailedOrReverted: Swap transaction failed or was reverted.

messages.quoteChangedBeforeExecution: Quote changed before execution: difference exceeds tolerance. Please review and try again.
